Published: May 3, 2026 | Last reviewed: May 3, 2026

Panadol — Uses, Dosage, Side Effects aur Pakistan Mein Price

TL;DR — Key Takeaways
  • Panadol = paracetamol = acetaminophen, sab same hain
  • Adult dose: 500-1000 mg har 4-6 ghante baad
  • Maximum 4,000 mg (4g) per 24 hours — overdose se liver damage
  • Pregnancy mein safe (Brufen ke khilaaf)
  • Bachon ko Calpol syrup, dose weight pe depend

Panadol Kya Hai?

Panadol GlaxoSmithKline ka brand name hai paracetamol (international: acetaminophen) ke liye. Pakistan mein sab se common over-the-counter pain killer aur antipyretic (bukhar utarne wali). Pakistan Bureau of Statistics ke mutabiq, Panadol Pakistan mein roz millions of tablets sell hoti hain.

Panadol — Quick Facts
Generic nameParacetamol (Acetaminophen)
ManufacturerGlaxoSmithKline (GSK)
Strengths500 mg, 1000 mg (Panadol 1000), 665 mg (Panadol Extra)
FormTablets, syrup (Calpol), suppositories
OTC statusAvailable without prescription
Pakistan mein price~10-30 PKR per strip (10 tablets)

Panadol Kis Liye Use Hoti Hai?

1. Bukhar (Fever)

Bukhar utarne ke liye safest aur most effective. Viral, bacterial, dengue — sab mein use ho sakti hai. Dengue mein sirf Panadol use karein, Brufen aur Aspirin nahi.

2. Sir Dard (Headache)

Tension headache aur migraine mein effective. Pehla choice for mild-to-moderate pain.

3. Body Pain

  • Muscle aches
  • Joint pain (osteoarthritis)
  • Back pain
  • Period cramps (Brufen ke saath alternate)

4. Dant Dard (Toothache)

Halki to medium intensity dant dard ke liye.

5. Post-Surgery Pain

Doctor's order pe regular doses.

6. Cold/Flu Symptoms

Body aches, sir dard, halki bukhar mein.

Panadol Dosage

Adults aur 12+ Bachon Ke Liye:

Single dose500-1000 mg (1-2 tablets of 500 mg ya 1 tablet of 1000 mg)
FrequencyHar 4-6 ghante baad
Maximum per 24 hrs4,000 mg (4 grams) — 8 tablets of 500 mg
Empty stomach safe?Haan — Brufen ke khilaaf
Onset of action30-60 minutes
Duration4-6 ghante

Bachon Ke Liye (Calpol Syrup):

Dose weight pe depend karta hai — 15 mg/kg har 4-6 ghante baad:

3-6 months (4-7 kg)2.5 ml Calpol Pediatric Suspension
6-24 months (7-12 kg)5 ml
2-4 years (12-16 kg)7.5 ml
4-6 years (16-22 kg)10 ml
6-8 years2 chamach (10 ml) of regular Calpol 6+
8-12 years2-3 chamach

3 mahine se kam baby: Sirf doctor consultation se. 100.4°F+ bukhar mein turant ER.

Panadol Ki Different Forms

1. Panadol 500 mg (Standard)

Sab se common. Bukhar, halka pain.

2. Panadol 1000 mg

Strong single dose, less frequent.

3. Panadol Extra (500 mg + 65 mg caffeine)

Migraine aur tension headache mein zyada effective. Caffeine analgesic effect barhata hai.

4. Panadol Cold & Flu

Paracetamol + decongestant + cough suppressant.

5. Calpol Syrup (Bachon Ke Liye)

Different concentrations: Calpol Pediatric (120 mg/5 ml), Calpol 6+ (250 mg/5 ml).

Panadol Side Effects

Recommended dose pe Panadol bohat safe hai. Magar:

Common (Halki):

  • Mitli ya pet kharab (kabhi)
  • Allergic skin rash (rare)

Serious (Overdose se):

  • Liver damage / failure — sab se badi danger
  • Kidney problems
  • Anemia (long-term high doses)
  • Severe allergic reaction (Stevens-Johnson syndrome — bohat rare)

Pregnancy aur Breastfeeding:

Pregnancy mein safe — first-line painkiller. Breastfeeding mein bhi safe.

Panadol kafi nahi ya symptoms barh rahe hain? Ilaaj AI pe doctor se mashwara — proper diagnosis aur stronger options ki guidance.

Doctor Se Milein

Panadol Overdose — Sab Se Bara Khatra

Pakistan mein paracetamol overdose suicide attempts ki common method hai. 10 grams (20 tablets of 500 mg) liver fail kar sakti hai.

Symptoms (24-72 hours mein):

  • Mitli, ulti
  • Pet ke upar dard (liver area)
  • Pasina aana
  • Yellow skin/eyes (jaundice — late sign)
  • Confusion

Action:

  1. Foran 1122 ya nearest ER
  2. Antidote (N-acetylcysteine) 8 ghante mein effective
  3. Symptoms na hone pe bhi go to ER — silent damage hota hai

Drug Interactions

Yeh dawai/items ke saath sambhal kar:

  • Alcohol: Liver damage ka khatra bohat barh jata hai
  • Warfarin (Coumadin): Bleeding ka khatra
  • Anti-TB drugs (INH, Rifampin): Liver toxicity
  • Phenytoin, Carbamazepine: Effect kam hota hai

Special Populations

Liver Disease:

Hepatitis ya cirrhosis mein dose half karein, doctor consultation zaruri.

Kidney Disease:

Severe kidney impairment mein dose adjust karein.

Old Age:

Maximum 3 grams (6 tablets) per day safer.

Malnourished:

Glutathione kam ke liye sensitive — kam dose.

Pakistan Mein Panadol Price

  • Panadol 500 mg: ~10-15 PKR per strip of 10
  • Panadol 1000 mg: ~25-30 PKR per strip
  • Panadol Extra: ~30-40 PKR per strip
  • Calpol syrup: ~80-150 PKR per bottle

Generic Alternatives (Same Drug, Cheaper)

  • Hilton (Hilton Pharma)
  • Calpol
  • Paracetamol generic versions
  • Pyromol

Sab same paracetamol hain. Brand price difference quality nahi, marketing aur packaging.

Panadol vs Brufen — Kab Kya?

PanadolBrufen 400
BukharBukhar
Halka painInflammation + pain
Khaali pet OKKhaane ke baad
Pregnancy safePregnancy mein avoid (3rd trimester)
Liver risk (overdose)Stomach ulcer, kidney risk
Dengue safeDengue mein NAHI

Kab Doctor Ko Milein?

  • 3 din se zyada Panadol use kar rahe hain bina relief
  • Bukhar 102°F+ aur 3 din se zyada
  • Pain barh raha hai dawai ke baad bhi
  • Yellow skin ya eyes
  • Allergic reaction (rash, soojan)
  • Bachon mein bukhar 3 din se zyada
  • Hamil ya breastfeeding mein consultation

Conclusion

Panadol Pakistan ki sab se safe aur common painkiller hai jab recommended dose pe use ho. Adult ke liye 500-1000 mg har 4-6 ghante baad, max 4 grams per day. Bachon mein weight ke hisab se Calpol syrup. Overdose liver fail kar sakti hai — 24 ghante mein 4 grams se zyada nahi. Ilaaj AI pe AI symptom check + doctor verification, sirf chand minute mein.

Frequently Asked Questions

Panadol ki ek din mein kitni tablet le sakte hain?

Adults aur 12+ saal bachon ke liye maximum 4,000 mg (4 grams) per 24 hours = 8 tablets of 500 mg, ya 4 tablets of 1000 mg. Single dose 500-1000 mg har 4-6 ghante baad. Iss se zyada lena liver damage ya failure kar sakta hai. Old age (65+) mein max 3 grams (6 tablets) safer hai.

Panadol khaali pet le sakte hain?

Haan, Panadol (paracetamol) khaali pet bilkul safe hai — Brufen aur aspirin ke khilaaf. Yeh stomach ulcer ka cause nahi banta. Magar agar pet kharab ho jaye to khaane ke saath le sakte hain. Dengue, jaundice, ya liver issues mein doctor mashware ke baghair na lein.

Bachon ko Panadol ki kitni dose dein?

Bachon ko Calpol syrup dein, dose weight pe depend karta hai (15 mg/kg har 4-6 ghante baad). 3-6 mahine (4-7 kg): 2.5 ml. 6-24 mahine (7-12 kg): 5 ml. 2-4 saal (12-16 kg): 7.5 ml. 4-6 saal: 10 ml. 3 mahine se kam baby mein bukhar emergency hai — turant doctor. Aspirin bachon ko bilkul na dein.

Pregnancy mein Panadol safe hai?

Haan, paracetamol (Panadol) pregnancy ke liye safest painkiller hai — first-line option. Bukhar aur dard mein zaruri use kar sakte hain. Brufen, Voltral, Aspirin pregnancy ke 3rd trimester mein bilkul avoid karein. Breastfeeding mein bhi Panadol safe hai. Magar kisi bhi medication ko long-term lena ho to gynecologist se mashwara karein.

Panadol Extra aur normal Panadol mein kya farq hai?

Panadol Extra mein paracetamol 500 mg + caffeine 65 mg hai. Caffeine analgesic effect 40% tak barhata hai — migraine aur tension headache ke liye zyada effective. Magar caffeine sensitivity wale logon ko ghabrahat ya neend mein dushwari ho sakti hai. Raat ko avoid karein. Hypertension ya heart issues mein doctor mashware se. Normal Panadol general use ke liye behtar hai.
